subject: Sports
title: Michigan vs Ohio State: The Game
description: A micro-lesson that makes Michigan vs Ohio State: The Game usable.

hook.text: They call it simply 'The Game.' Michigan vs Ohio State is American college football's most iconic rivalry.

buildup.text: The rivalry dates to 1897. Ohio State coach Woody Hayes once refused to buy gas in Michigan—he'd rather run out.

discovery.text: The 1969 game—when Michigan upset undefeated Ohio State—is called 'The Upset of the Century' in college football.

twist.text: In 1973, both teams were 10-0 going into The Game. The tie sent Ohio State to the Rose Bowl, enraging Michigan.

climax.text: The rivalry defines the Big Ten conference and remains the most-anticipated regular-season game in college football.

punchline.text: Woody Hayes wouldn't even buy gas in Michigan. That's how deep it goes.

quiz.question: Why is Michigan vs Ohio State called 'The Game'?
options: It's considered the most important and iconic college football rivalry
It was the first college football game ever played
The winner receives a special trophy called 'The Game'
